U.S. Average Gas Price Drops Below $4 Per Gallon for First Time Since April
Gas Prices Today, June 5: Check fuel latest rates in California, Texas, Florida, New York, and Pennsylvania as National Average sees a dip

regions.why: WTI crude is falling and already 3% down, with national prices dropping below $4/gallon. Your region is 3¢ above the local low, suggesting a brief dip. However, full transmission to retail typically lags 2–5 days, so further reductions are likely incoming.
